name: Bioline dental water for dogs & cats- 300ML
shortDescription: Bioline dental water for pets is a dental care product specifically formulated for pets.
description: Bioline dental water for pets is a dental care product specifically formulated for pets. It improves hygiene in the pet’s mouth. It freshens the pet’s breath. Bioline dental water for pets is made of high-quality food-grade ingredients. It is safe to use on dogs and cats frequently. It prevents the formation of tartars and plaques in the dog’s mouth. Directions for use : Add this dental water to your animals normal drinking water. Mixing ration 1:50. The dental water completely dissolves in the drinking water. Ingredients : Deionised water, sodium benzoate, polysorbate 20, glycerin, proteases, sodium chloride, hydroxyethyl-cellulose, zinc gluconate, glucose oxidase, lysozyme, parfum
